heading: Reduced rates not allowed for smuggled or illegally produced beer, wine, or spirits
label: 5067 Reduced rates not allowed for smuggled or illegally produced beer, wine, or spirits
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5067 was renumbered .section 5068 of this title

Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–260, div. EE, title I, § 108(c)134 Stat. 3049Dec. 27, 2020“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section and transferring former to ] shall apply to beer, wine, or distilled spirits, as the case may be, produced after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”section 5067 of this titlesection 5068 of this titleDec. 27, 2020
amendments: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–260, div. EE, title I, § 108(c)134 Stat. 3049Dec. 27, 2020“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section and transferring former to ] shall apply to beer, wine, or distilled spirits, as the case may be, produced after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”section 5067 of this titlesection 5068 of this titleDec. 27, 2020

children.text: the rates of tax under paragraphs (1)(A)(i) and (2) of section 5051(a) shall not apply in the case of any such beer,
the credit under section 5041(c) shall not apply in the case of any such wine, and
the rates of tax under section 5001(c) shall not apply in the case of any such distilled spirits.
